## The machine

- Brand / model / model code:
- Voltage / region (100-120 V / 220-240 V):

## Wet side

- Heater type (boiler / thermoblock / thermocoil):
- Pump type (vibration / rotary):
- 3-way solenoid valve? (yes / no):
- Original OPV setting (bar, if known):
- Group head type:

## Dry side

- Mains switch wiring (single-pole / double-pole):
- Stock control board (mechanical thermostat / electronic / display):
- Existing thermistor / thermocouple? type and where:

## What you want from Esp32esso

- [ ] Tier 1 - temp control
- [ ] Tier 2 - telemetry
- [ ] Tier 3 - profiling
- [ ] Tier 4 - scales/OTA
